title: hash.len() cast to c_int via 'as' instead of try_from in EccKey::sign/verify
description: key.rs:150 and 190 cast hash.len() as std::ffi::c_int using 'as', which silently truncates on 32-bit targets if len > i32::MAX. The same file already uses i32::try_from for sig.len() (line 179), so the inconsistency is visible. All len-to-c_int conversions should use try_from and map_err to Error::InvalidArg for consistency and correctness.
